params.prompt: Photorealistic editorial interior reference photograph of a Taste. Focus tightly on: kitchen cabinets, range hood, kitchen island or counter, hand-thrown ceramic bowl in Muted Clay on counter, visible sightline to round light-oak dining table — 42in diameter (shared object) and woven pendant (shared object), simple ceramic bowl or hand-thrown vase in Muted Clay on counter, visible window light as primary directional source. Styled in japandi aesthetic, warm_neutral palette, soft_ambient lighting. Calm, minimal Japandi interiors tuned for a young family: warm neutrals, low-profile furniture, natural materials, and a compact cozy work corner. Prioritize layered textures (linen, jute, hand-thrown ceramics), sculptural plant groupings, and a single woven pendant as a dining focal point. Keep decor minimal and purposeful so sightlines between living, dining and kitchen feel cohesive and uncluttered. This image is a visual consistency reference — every detail of the featured furniture and fixtures must be clearly visible and precisely rendered. No people. No visible brand logos. Sharp architectural photography. Luxury real estate staging.
